name: Mirchi Powder
description: Premium quality red chili powder made from handpicked sun-dried chilies. Adds authentic heat and vibrant color to your dishes.
descriptionMr: हाताने निवडलेल्या सुकवलेल्या मिरच्यांपासून बनवलेली प्रीमियम दर्जाची लाल मिरची पावडर. तुमच्या पदार्थांना प्रमाणिक तिखटपणा आणि दमदार रंग देते.
cookingUses: Ideal for curries, gravies, marinades, and tempering. Adds heat and color to all Indian dishes.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: Haldi Powder
description: Premium turmeric powder sourced from the finest farms. Rich in curcumin with natural golden color and earthy aroma.
descriptionMr: उत्तम शेतातून मिळवलेली प्रीमियम हळद पावडर. कुरकुमिनने समृद्ध, नैसर्गिक सोनेरी रंग आणि मातीचा सुगंध.
cookingUses: Essential for all Indian curries, rice dishes, lentil soups, and as a natural food colorant.
storageInstructions: Keep in a sealed container away from moisture and direct heat. Shelf life: 18 months.

name: Dhania Powder
description: Aromatic coriander powder made from premium quality seeds. Adds a fresh, citrusy flavor to your cooking.
descriptionMr: प्रीमियम दर्जाच्या बियांपासून बनवलेली सुगंधी धनिया पावडर. तुमच्या स्वयंपाकाला ताजा, लिंबूवर्गीय चव देते.
cookingUses: Used in curries, spice blends, marinades, and as a finishing spice for various dishes.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. Avoid moisture exposure.

name: Garam Masala
description: A premium blend of 12 aromatic spices including cardamom, cinnamon, cloves, and black pepper. Adds warmth and depth to any dish.
descriptionMr: वेलची, दालचिनी, लवंग आणि काळी मिरी यासह १२ सुगंधी मसाल्यांचे प्रीमियम मिश्रण. कोणत्याही पदार्थाला उबदारपणा आणि खोली देते.
cookingUses: Add at the end of cooking for maximum aroma. Perfect for curries, biryanis, and lentil dishes.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight glass container away from light and moisture. Best used within 6 months.

name: Kala Masala
description: A traditional Maharashtrian spice blend with a distinct dark color and robust flavor. Essential for authentic Kolhapuri cuisine.
descriptionMr: विशिष्ट गडद रंग आणि तीव्र चव असलेले पारंपारिक महाराष्ट्रीय मसाला मिश्रण. प्रमाणिक कोल्हापुरी पाककृतीसाठी आवश्यक.
cookingUses: Ideal for meat curries, vegetable dishes, and traditional Maharashtrian recipes like Misal Pav.
storageInstructions: Keep in an airtight container. Store in a cool, dark place for maximum freshness.

name: Kitchen King
description: An all-purpose premium masala blend that adds royal flavor to every dish. The perfect everyday spice mix.
descriptionMr: प्रत्येक पदार्थाला शाही चव देणारे सर्व-उद्देशीय प्रीमियम मसाला मिश्रण. परिपूर्ण दैनंदिन मसाला मिश्रण.
cookingUses: Use in all daily cooking - vegetables, dals, curries, and stir-fries for a complete flavor profile.
storageInstructions: Store in a sealed container in a cool, dry place. Shelf life: 12 months.

name: Chicken Masala
description: A specially crafted blend for chicken dishes. Perfect for making authentic, flavorful chicken curries.
descriptionMr: चिकन पदार्थांसाठी विशेषतः तयार केलेले मिश्रण. प्रमाणिक, चवदार चिकन करी बनवण्यासाठी उत्तम.
cookingUses: Use for marinating chicken and in chicken curries. Adds authentic restaurant-style flavor.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from moisture.

name: Mutton Masala
description: A robust spice blend specially designed for mutton dishes. Tenderizes meat and adds rich, deep flavors.
descriptionMr: मटन पदार्थांसाठी विशेषतः डिझाइन केलेले तीव्र मसाला मिश्रण. मांस मऊ करते आणि समृद्ध, गहन चव देते.
cookingUses: Marinate mutton for 2-3 hours before cooking. Essential for authentic mutton curries and biryani.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. Keep away from direct sunlight.

name: Chicken Masala ₹10 Pouch
description: Affordable chicken masala pouch with authentic flavor. Perfect for home cooking on a budget.
descriptionMr: प्रमाणिक चवीसह परवडणारे चिकन मसाला पाउच. बजेटमध्ये घरगुती स्वयंपाकासाठी उत्तम.
cookingUses: Quick and easy chicken curry in minutes. Great for everyday cooking.
storageInstructions: Keep in a cool, dry place. Use within 30 days of opening.

name: Mutton Masala ₹10 Pouch
description: Budget-friendly mutton masala pouch. Makes delicious mutton curry without breaking the bank.
descriptionMr: बजेट-अनुकूल मटन मसाला पाउच. जास्त खर्च न करता चवदार मटन करी बनवते.
cookingUses: Perfect for quick mutton curries. Use with your preferred cooking method.
storageInstructions: Store in a dry place. Use within 30 days of opening the pouch.

name: Mirchi Powder ₹10 Pouch
description: Quality red chili powder in an affordable pouch. Pure heat at a budget price.
descriptionMr: परवडणाऱ्या पाउचमध्ये दर्जेदार लाल मिरची पावडर. बजेट किंमतीत शुद्ध तिखटपणा.
cookingUses: Ideal for daily cooking, tempering, and adding heat to any dish.
storageInstructions: Keep in a dry, cool place. Consume within 30 days of opening.

name: Haldi Powder ₹10 Pouch
description: Pure turmeric powder at an unbeatable price. Perfect for everyday cooking needs.
descriptionMr: अतुलनीय किंमतीत शुद्ध हळद पावडर. दैनंदिन स्वयंपाकाच्या गरजांसाठी उत्तम.
cookingUses: Everyday cooking, medicinal use, and as a natural colorant.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 30 days after opening.

name: Dhania Powder ₹10 Pouch
description: Premium coriander powder in a budget-friendly pouch. Add fresh flavor without the premium price.
descriptionMr: बजेट-अनुकूल पाउचमध्ये प्रीमियम धनिया पावडर. प्रीमियम किंमतीशिवाय ताजी चव मिळवा.
cookingUses: Essential for daily curries, spice blends, and as a finishing spice.
storageInstructions: Keep in a dry, cool place. Use within 30 days of opening.

name: Garlic Mix Chutney
description: A flavorful garlic-based chutney with a perfect balance of spice and tanginess. Made with premium ingredients.
descriptionMr: मसाला आणि आंबटपणाचा उत्तम समतोल असलेली चवदार लसूण-आधारित चटणी. प्रीमियम घटकांपासून बनवलेली.
cookingUses: Serve as a condiment with meals, use as a sandwich spread, or mix with rice for instant flavor.
storageInstructions: Refrigerate after opening. Best consumed within 15 days of opening.

name: Achar Masala
description: A special blend of spices for making traditional Indian pickles. Preserves and flavors your pickles perfectly.
descriptionMr: पारंपारिक भारतीय आचार बनवण्यासाठी मसाल्यांचे विशेष मिश्रण. तुमचे आचार उत्तम प्रकारे जतन आणि चवदार बनवते.
cookingUses: Essential for making mango pickle, lemon pickle, and mixed vegetable pickles.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dark place. Shelf life: 12 months.

name: Special Khichadi Masala
description: Aromatic spice blend specially created for khichadi. Adds warmth and depth to this comfort food.
descriptionMr: खिचडीसाठी विशेषतः तयार केलेले सुगंधी मसाला मिश्रण. या आरामदायी पदार्थाला उबदारपणा आणि खोली देते.
cookingUses: Perfect for moong dal khichadi, vegetable khichadi, and other one-pot meals.
storageInstructions: Keep in a sealed container in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months for best flavor.

name: Tea Masala
description: Aromatic spice blend for authentic masala chai. Adds warmth, flavor, and a touch of luxury to your tea.
descriptionMr: प्रमाणिक मसाला चहासाठी सुगंधी मसाला मिश्रण. तुमच्या चहाला उबदारपणा, चव आणि थोडी शान देते.
cookingUses: Add to your regular tea while boiling for authentic masala chai flavor.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container away from moisture. Best used within 6 months.

name: Sambhar Masala
description: Traditional South Indian sambhar powder made with roasted spices and lentils. Authentic, aromatic, and flavorful.
descriptionMr: भाजलेले मसाले आणि डाळींपासून बनवलेली पारंपारिक दक्षिण भारतीय सांबार पावडर. प्रमाणिक, सुगंधी आणि चवदार.
cookingUses: Essential for authentic sambhar, vegetable stews, and lentil-based dishes.
storageInstructions: Keep in an airtight container in a cool, dark place. Shelf life: 12 months.

name: Pav Bhaji Masala
description: Authentic Mumbai street style pav bhaji masala. Turns ordinary vegetables into a delicious, spicy bhaji.
descriptionMr: प्रमाणिक मुंबई स्ट्रीट स्टाईल पाव भाजी मसाला. सामान्य भाज्यांना चवदार, मसालेदार भाजीमध्ये बदलते.
cookingUses: Essential for making pav bhaji. Also great for other vegetable dishes and sandwich spreads.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months.

name: Kolhapuri Mutton Masala
description: Authentic Kolhapuri spice blend for mutton. Known for its intense heat and rich, complex flavors.
descriptionMr: मटनसाठी प्रमाणिक कोल्हापुरी मसाला मिश्रण. त्याच्या तीव्र तिखटपणा आणि समृद्ध, जटिल चवीसाठी ओळखले जाते.
cookingUses: Use for authentic Kolhapuri mutton curry. Marinate meat for best results.
storageInstructions: Keep in an airtight container in a cool, dark place. Shelf life: 12 months.

name: Kolhapuri Biryani Masala
description: Special biryani masala with a Kolhapuri twist. Aromatic, spicy, and perfect for layered rice dishes.
descriptionMr: कोल्हापुरी ट्विस्टसह विशेष बिर्याणी मसाला. सुगंधी, मसालेदार आणि थरांच्या तांदळाच्या पदार्थांसाठी उत्तम.
cookingUses: Perfect for chicken biryani, mutton biryani, and vegetable biryani.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container away from light and moisture. Use within 6 months.

name: Kolhapuri Chicken Masala
description: Spicy Kolhapuri chicken masala that brings the heat of Kolhapur to your kitchen. Authentic and bold.
descriptionMr: मसालेदार कोल्हापुरी चिकन मसाला जो कोल्हापूरचा तिखटपणा तुमच्या स्वयंपाकघरात आणतो. प्रमाणिक आणि बोल्ड.
cookingUses: Essential for authentic Kolhapuri chicken curry. Best used with bone-in chicken.
storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. Shelf life: 12 months.

name: Kolhapuri Shev Bhaji Masala
description: Special masala for the famous Kolhapuri Shev Bhaji. A unique street food experience at home.
descriptionMr: प्रसिद्ध कोल्हापुरी शेव भाजीसाठी विशेष मसाला. घरी एक अनोखा स्ट्रीट फूड अनुभव.
cookingUses: Perfect for making authentic Shev Bhaji. Also great for spicy potato and pea dishes.
storageInstructions: Keep in a sealed container in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months.
